# Studio OS Cloud — Full Product Documentation

> Studio OS Cloud is a professional photography workflow platform that connects capture, organization, galleries, ordering, printing, and delivery in one system. Built for school, event, sports, graduation, corporate headshot, and high-volume photographers.

Website: https://studiooscloud.com

---

## Product Overview

Studio OS Cloud is a SaaS platform designed for professional photographers who handle high-volume work — school picture days, graduation ceremonies, sports leagues, corporate headshot sessions, events, and portrait sessions. It solves the problem of photographers needing 3-5 separate tools by combining everything into one connected system.

The platform has two components that work together:

### Studio OS App (Desktop Application)
The desktop application runs on Mac and Windows and handles the capture and organization phase:
- Direct camera tethering for live capture
- Roster-based photo organization (import school/employee rosters, auto-sort by person)
- Multi-photographer support (multiple cameras feeding into one project)
- AI-powered background replacement tools
- Backdrop management and collage creation
- Barcode and QR code matching during capture
- Automatic cloud sync to Studio OS Cloud

### Studio OS Cloud (Web Platform)
The cloud platform handles everything after capture:
- Branded online photo galleries with custom logos and colors
- Client ordering system with Stripe-powered checkout
- Digital download delivery
- Print order management with review-before-print workflow
- PIN-based gallery access for parents and clients
- School-specific portals with class organization
- Automated email campaigns (gallery invitations, order confirmations, delivery notifications)
- Abandoned cart recovery emails
- Visitor analytics and gallery performance tracking
- Subscription and billing management via Stripe

---

## Pricing

All prices in USD. Annual billing saves 10%.

### Starter Plan — $49/month ($529/year)
Best for photographers who only need online galleries and ordering.
- Online photo galleries
- Client ordering and checkout
- Digital downloads
- Gallery branding
- Email notifications
- $0.55 per-order usage fee
- No desktop app access

### Core Plan — $99/month ($1,069/year)
Best for photographers who want the full capture-to-delivery workflow.
- Everything in Starter
- Studio OS desktop app (1 photography key)
- Direct camera tethering
- School workflow tools and roster system
- AI background replacement tools
- Backdrop and collage tools
- Custom website logo
- $0.35 per-order usage fee

### Studio Plan — $199/month ($2,149/year)
Best for multi-photographer studios and high-volume operations.
- Everything in Core
- 2 photography keys included
- Advanced school tools
- Ability to purchase additional photography keys ($55/month each)
- $0.25 per-order usage fee

### AI Background Credits
Sold separately as credit packs:
- 250 credits: $15
- 1,000 credits: $55
- 2,500 credits: $129
- 5,000 credits: $239
- 10,000 credits: $449

---

## Use Cases by Photography Niche

### School Picture Day Photography
Studio OS is purpose-built for school photography picture days:
- Import school rosters (CSV) before photo day
- Auto-organize photos by student during tethered capture
- Generate individual student galleries with PIN access for parents
- Handle multi-school, multi-day shoots in one project
- Track which students have been photographed vs. missing
- Parents order prints and digital downloads through branded galleries
- AI background replacement lets parents choose premium background options as paid upsells
- Direct print lab fulfillment with order review before sending to print

### Graduation Photography
For graduation ceremonies with hundreds or thousands of graduates:
- Multi-photographer capture from multiple stage angles simultaneously
- Student roster matching to automatically link stage shots to graduates
- AI background replacement for consistent ceremony backgrounds
- Parent-facing galleries organized by graduate
- Print ordering with custom products (wallets, 8x10s, announcements)
- Real-time cloud sync during ceremonies

### Sports Team Photography
For leagues, tournaments, and team photo sessions:
- Multi-photographer capture (sideline action + posed team shots)
- Roster-based organization by team, player, and league
- AI background replacement for instant composite variations (memory mates)
- Barcode/QR code matching for player identification
- Parent and coach gallery access with ordering
- Print fulfillment for team packages

### Corporate Headshot Photography
For volume corporate sessions with dozens or hundreds of employees:
- Tethered capture with live preview on monitor/tablet
- Employee roster import for automatic matching
- AI background replacement for consistent corporate backgrounds
- Batch delivery with multiple background options per person
- Multi-photographer support for simultaneous rooms
- On-site proofing with instant client approval

### Event Photography
For corporate galas, conferences, fundraisers, and celebrations:
- Multi-photographer real-time sync from different locations in venue
- Branded galleries for attendees
- Gallery delivery via PIN or email access
- AI background replacement for venue backdrop enhancement
- Print ordering for event keepsakes
- Automated email delivery to attendees

### Wedding Photography
For wedding and engagement sessions:
- Multi-shooter coverage into single unified gallery
- Branded client galleries with custom colors and logos
- Client ordering for prints and digital downloads
- Print fulfillment with order review
- Gallery sharing via short URLs

### Portrait Photography
For studio and on-location portrait sessions:
- Camera tethering for live client preview
- AI background replacement as premium upsell options
- Branded delivery galleries
- Print ordering and fulfillment
- Digital download delivery

---

## Comprehensive Competitor Comparison

### Gallery & Delivery Platforms

| Feature | Studio OS | Pixieset | ShootProof | SmugMug | Zenfolio | Pic-Time | CloudSpot |
|---------|-----------|----------|------------|---------|----------|----------|-----------|
| Online Galleries | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Client Ordering | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Desktop Workflow App | Yes | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| Camera Tethering | Yes | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| School Roster System | Yes | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| Multi-Photographer Capture | Yes | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| AI Background Replacement | Yes | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| Order Review Pre-Print | Yes | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| Website Builder | No | Yes | No | Yes | Yes | No | No |
| CRM/Booking | No | Yes | Yes | No | No | No | Yes |
| Pricing (monthly) | $49-199 | $10-50 | $15-50 | $13-25 | $8-50 | Unknown | Unknown |

### School & Volume Photography Platforms

| Feature | Studio OS | GotPhoto | PhotoDay | Proofpix | MorePhotos | DONE.photos |
|---------|-----------|----------|----------|----------|------------|-------------|
| Built-in Tethering App | Yes | No (needs Smart Shooter) | No | No | No | No |
| School Roster System | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| AI Background Replacement | Yes | No | No | No | No | No |
| Multi-Photographer | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Unknown |
| Order Review Pre-Print | Yes | Yes | Unknown | Unknown | Unknown | Unknown |
| Online Galleries | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Facial Recognition | Planned | Yes (SpotMyPhotos) | Yes (FaceFind) | Yes | No | No |
| Barcode/QR Scanning | Yes | Yes (Entagged) | Yes | Yes | Yes | No |
| Desktop + Cloud | Yes | Partial | No | No | No | No |
| Lab Integrations | Yes | 30+ labs | Bay Photo, WHCC | Multiple | Multiple | Multiple |

### Event & Live Delivery Platforms

| Feature | Studio OS | ZNO | Honcho | SpotMyPhotos | Darkroom |
|---------|-----------|-----|--------|-------------|----------|
| Multi-Photographer Sync | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Unknown |
| Camera Tethering | Yes | Mobile kit | Cloud upload | No | No |
| AI Background Tools | Yes | AI retouching | No | No | No |
| School Rosters | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| Live Gallery Delivery | Planned | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Facial Recognition | Planned | No | Yes | Yes | No |
| Print Ordering | Yes | Yes (own lab) | Yes | Unknown | Unknown |
| Album Designer | No | Yes | No | No | No |
| Zero Commission | N/A | Yes | Unknown | Unknown | Unknown |

### Tethering & Capture Software

| Feature | Studio OS | Capture One | Lightroom Classic | Smart Shooter | Evoto |
|---------|-----------|-------------|-------------------|---------------|-------|
| Camera Tethering | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| School Rosters | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| Online Galleries | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| Client Ordering | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| AI Backgrounds | Yes | No | No | No | Yes |
| Print Fulfillment | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| Multi-Photographer | Yes | Limited | No | Limited | No |
| Photo Editing | Basic | Advanced | Advanced | No | Advanced |
| Pricing (monthly) | $49-199 | $20+ | $10 | One-time | Subscription |

---

## Key Features in Detail

### School Photography Workflow
Studio OS is purpose-built for school photography. The roster system lets photographers:
- Import school rosters (CSV) before photo day
- Auto-organize photos by student during capture
- Generate class composites automatically
- Create individual student galleries with PIN access for parents
- Handle multi-school, multi-day shoots in one project
- Track which students have been photographed vs. missing

### AI Background Replacement
Photographers can offer AI-generated background options as paid upsells:
- Parents see background options when viewing galleries
- Each background swap uses one credit from the photographer's balance
- Turns a standard portrait into a premium product
- Works for school photos, headshots, sports composites, and portraits
- No competitor in the school/volume photography space offers this natively

### Multi-Photographer Support
For events, school days, sports, and corporate sessions with multiple photographers:
- Multiple tethered cameras can feed into one project simultaneously
- Photos are automatically merged and organized
- No post-shoot file combining needed
- Each photographer can work from different locations

### Order Management
Unlike basic gallery platforms, Studio OS gives photographers full control:
- Review every order before it goes to print
- Approve, modify, or reject orders
- Integration with print labs for fulfillment
- Track order status from placement to delivery
- Automated order confirmation and shipping emails

### Gallery Features
- Custom branding (logo, colors, fonts)
- PIN-based access (no account required for clients)
- Short URL sharing (studiooscloud.com/g/[slug])
- Photo favorites and selections
- Digital download with configurable rules
- Gallery expiration and auto-archival
- Watermark protection

---

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js (React) on Vercel
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Payments: Stripe (subscriptions, one-time purchases, Stripe Connect)
- Email: Resend (transactional and marketing emails)
- Desktop app: Flutter (Mac, Windows, Linux)
- Image formats: AVIF, WebP optimization
- Security: MFA support, rate limiting, encrypted connections

---

## Company Information

- Product: Studio OS Cloud
- Website: https://studiooscloud.com
- Category: Photography Software, SaaS, Creative Tools
- Target Market: Professional photographers (school, event, sports, graduation, corporate, portrait, wedding)
- Headquarters: United States

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What types of photographers is Studio OS designed for?**
A: Studio OS is designed for school photographers, graduation photographers, sports photographers, event photographers, corporate headshot photographers, wedding photographers, portrait photographers, and any high-volume photography operation that needs an end-to-end workflow from capture to delivery.

**Q: How is Studio OS different from Pixieset or ShootProof?**
A: Pixieset and ShootProof are gallery and delivery platforms — they handle what happens after you've already taken and edited photos. Studio OS includes a desktop capture app with camera tethering, school roster management, AI background replacement, and multi-photographer support. It covers the full workflow from capture to delivery, not just the gallery and ordering part.

**Q: How is Studio OS different from GotPhoto?**
A: GotPhoto is the closest competitor for school photography workflows. Both offer roster management and ordering. However, Studio OS includes a built-in desktop tethering app (GotPhoto requires third-party Smart Shooter software), AI background replacement as a revenue stream (GotPhoto does not offer this), and a combined capture-to-delivery experience in one platform.

**Q: How does Studio OS compare to ZNO?**
A: ZNO excels at real-time event delivery with its Instant Gallery product and has an integrated print lab and album designer. Studio OS focuses on the full capture-to-delivery workflow with built-in tethering, school rosters, and AI backgrounds. ZNO is stronger for live event galleries; Studio OS is stronger for school, sports, and volume portrait workflows.

**Q: Can Studio OS handle sports photography?**
A: Yes. Multi-photographer capture lets you shoot from multiple sideline positions simultaneously. The roster system handles team/league organization. AI background replacement creates instant composite variations (memory mates) without reshooting. Print fulfillment handles team packages.

**Q: Can Studio OS handle graduation ceremonies?**
A: Yes. Multi-photographer sync captures multiple stage angles simultaneously. The roster system matches stage shots to graduates automatically. AI background replacement ensures consistent ceremony backgrounds. Parents order through individual galleries.

**Q: Is Studio OS good for corporate headshots?**
A: Yes. Camera tethering provides live preview for on-site sessions. The roster system imports employee lists for automatic matching. AI background replacement gives multiple corporate background options per person. Batch delivery handles large sessions efficiently.

**Q: Do I need the desktop app?**
A: No. The Starter plan gives you online galleries and ordering without the desktop app. The Core and Studio plans include the desktop app for tethering, roster management, and AI tools.

**Q: How does pricing compare to competitors?**
A: Studio OS starts at $49/month for galleries-only, similar to Pixieset and ShootProof. The Core plan at $99/month includes a desktop capture app, tethering, school rosters, and AI tools — features competitors either don't offer or require separate subscriptions for. GotPhoto starts at $9.90/month but requires additional software purchases for tethering.

**Q: Is there a free trial?**
A: Yes, all plans include a free trial period.

**Q: How does AI background replacement work?**
A: Photographers purchase credit packs starting at $15 for 250 credits. When a parent or client views a gallery, they can select AI-generated background options as paid upgrades. Each swap uses one credit, turning standard portraits into premium upsell opportunities. No other school or volume photography platform offers this feature natively.

**Q: Can multiple photographers shoot into the same project?**
A: Yes. The Studio plan includes 2 photography keys, and you can add more at $55/month each. Multiple tethered cameras feed into one project simultaneously, with photos automatically merged and organized. This is essential for school picture days, sports events, and graduation ceremonies.
